allow: Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('app.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('app.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); import os; k = os.getenv\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'\); print\('Found' if k and not k.startswith\('your-actual'\) else 'Missing or placeholder'\); print\('Length:', len\(k\) if k else 0\)")

Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber, PyPDF2, fitz; print\('all 3 import ok'\)")
